title: Unit tests for lib/prompts.mjs
goal: Create tests/prompts.test.mjs containing node:test unit tests for interpolateTemplate and loadPromptTemplate exported from plugins/codex/scripts/lib/prompts.mjs. Mirror the exact style of tests/args.test.mjs: `import test from "node:test"`, `import assert from "node:assert/strict"`, relative ESM import of the module under test. For interpolateTemplate cover: single {{TOKEN}} substitution, multiple different tokens in one template, the same token repeated, an unknown token replaced with the empty string, a template with no tokens returned unchanged, and that only [A-Z_] uppercase/underscore keys are treated as tokens (e.g. {{lower}} or {{Mixed1}} are left literal). For loadPromptTemplate: create a temporary directory with os.tmpdir()+fs.mkdtempSync, write a prompts/<name>.md file inside it, and assert loadPromptTemplate(tmpRoot, name) returns that file's contents; clean up the temp dir afterward. Do not modify plugins/codex/scripts/lib/prompts.mjs — only add the test file.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/prompts.test.mjs exists and only tests plugins/codex/scripts/lib/prompts.mjs
node --test tests/prompts.test.mjs passes with every test green
interpolateTemplate coverage includes: single token, multiple tokens, repeated token, unknown-token-to-empty-string, no-token passthrough, and non-uppercase keys left literal
loadPromptTemplate is tested against a real temp file under a prompts/ subdirectory and the temp dir is cleaned up
